economic_notes: Paul First Nation owns 100% of multiple entities including Paul Band Land Holdings Ltd., Paul First Nation Industry Relations Corporation, Paul First Nation Renewable Energy (GP) Inc., PFN Development Corporation, PFN Resources Inc., Weh-Hnim-Nay Energy (GP) Inc., Wapta Mnodai Developments Ltd. (o/a Ironhead Golf Course), and 399250 Alberta Ltd. Capital projects totalling remaining estimated cost of $3 million ongoing. Nation is economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada funding.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient evidence on investments in related First Nation entities; some entities accounted for under modified equity method rather than full consolidation as required. Prior period restatement recorded for previously unrecorded bank account, understated investment in Weh-Hnim-Nay Energy LP, and understated ISC deferred revenue. Restricted cash includes $292,913 externally restricted (Province of Alberta) and $3,133,644 internally restricted. CMHC Replacement Reserve Fund was underfunded by $576,324. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. osr calculated as total revenue $31,588,079 minus ISC $22,960,750 minus ISC Health $2,186,015 minus CMHC $53,905 minus First Nations Development Fund $602,084 minus Service Canada ISETS $802,807 = $4,983,518. annual_debt_service reflects only principal repayments per cash flow statement.
